---
pagetitle: "Raymond Parcon"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false

listing: 
  - id: recent-blog-listing
    contents:
      - "blog/*/*.qmd"
      - "blog/*/*.md"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 9
    page-size: 3
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, image, description, date]
  
  - id: recent-paper-listing
    contents:
      - "papers/*/*.qmd"
      - "papers/*/*.md"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 9
    page-size: 3
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, image, description, date]

---

```{=html}
<div class="site-hero mb-5">
  <div class="site-intro">
    <h1 class="site-title text-primary mt-0 fw-lighter text-center text-sm-start">
      Raymond
      <span class="nowrap">Parcon</span>
    </h1>

    <div class="social-icon-links my-3">
      <a 
        class="link-primary" 
        href="mailto:rhparcon@uga.edu"
        title="rhparcon@uga.edu"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener"
      >
        <i class="fas fa-envelope fa-lg fa-fw"></i>
        Email Me     
      </a>

      <a 
        class="link-primary" 
        href="parcon_ray_cv.pdf"
        title="Raymond Parcon-CV"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener"
      >
        <i class="fas fa-file-pdf fa-lg fa-fw"></i>
        CV  
      </a>
    </div>

    <p class="site-intro fs-5">
      I’m a <strong>Graduate Research Assistant</strong> and a <strong>Ph.D. candidate</strong> in Plant Pathology at the University of Georgia. My research combines genomics and bioinformatics to understand how fungal plant pathogens adapt and evolve to overcome host resistance.
    </p>
    <a class="mt4 action text" href="/about/about.qmd"><em>About Me</em> →</a>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-photo">
    <img src="images/initials_logo.png" alt="RP_icon">
  </div>  
</div>
```

## Recent [Posts](/blog/blog.qmd)

::: {#recent-blog-listing}
:::

## Recent [Papers](/papers/papers.qmd)

::: {#recent-paper-listing}
:::
